3047900.name: C.A.S.H. - Commerce And Stealthy Heists
3047900.description:
Commerce And Stealthy Heists (C.A.S.H.) drops you into a dual life of respectability and risk. Sunshine hours are for buying stock, setting prices, and charming customers. When darkness falls, the real profits begin: scout empty apartments, disable alarms, and lift valuables before the cops catch on—all with friends in four-player online co-op.

Key Features:

Daytime Retail Tycoon

Order goods from competing suppliers, refurbish second-hand finds, and react to a dynamic economy.

Customize shelving, décor, and signage to attract bigger crowds and VIP buyers.

Night-Time Stealth Heists

Purchase intel, pick locks, cut wires, and outsmart traps in procedural apartments.

Mini-games for lock-picking, circuit hacking, and trap disarming keep every break-in tense.

Three Skill Trees

Commerce

Stealth

Tech

Co-op Roles

Reputation & Risk

Clean sales grow your public image; dodgy goods raise suspicion and police patrols.

A rising Heat meter unlocks tougher security systems—and bigger payouts.

Side Hustles

Take courier jobs, flip rare collectors’ items, or dabble in the black market to fund new gear.
3047900.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
